message:
feat(ci): add dist.yml + release-automation.yml release pipeline

Adapt the destructive_command_guard release infrastructure pattern:

- release-automation.yml watches main for Cargo.toml version bumps and
  auto-creates a `vX.Y.Z` tag.
- dist.yml fires on `v*` tag push (and workflow_dispatch). Builds
  release binaries for linux/{amd64,arm64}, darwin/{amd64,arm64}, and
  windows/amd64; packages them as franken_whisper-<tag>-<os_arch>.tar.gz
  (.zip on Windows) to match install.sh's expectations.
- Generates per-archive .sha256 files plus an aggregate SHA256SUMS,
  signs each archive with cosign sigstore bundles, copies install.sh
  and (if present) install.ps1 into the release assets, then publishes
  via softprops/action-gh-release@v3 with auto-generated release notes.
- Optional Homebrew tap notification on success when HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN
  is set on the repo.

Tests are run advisory (continue-on-error) so transient toolchain churn
doesn't block binary publishing — the test gate is owned by ci.yml on
PRs, not release.yml on tags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,203 @@
+name: dist
+
+on:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        with:
+          components: rustfmt, clippy
+
+      - name: Check formatting
+        run: cargo fmt -- --check
+
+      - name: Run clippy
+        run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
+        continue-on-error: true # advisory until codebase is fully clippy-clean
+
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: cargo test --lib
+
+  build:
+    needs: test
+    # Tests are advisory, never block the binary release.
+    if: always() && !cancelled()
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            os_arch: linux_amd64
+            archive_ext: tar.gz
+            binary: franken_whisper
+          - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            os_arch: linux_arm64
+            archive_ext: tar.gz
+            binary: franken_whisper
+          - os: macos-15-intel
+            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+            os_arch: darwin_amd64
+            archive_ext: tar.gz
+            binary: franken_whisper
+          - os: macos-14
+            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+            os_arch: darwin_arm64
+            archive_ext: tar.gz
+            binary: franken_whisper
+          - os: windows-latest
+            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+            os_arch: windows_amd64
+            archive_ext: zip
+            binary: franken_whisper.exe
+
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+
+      - name: Install Rust stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        with:
+          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Build release binary
+        run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Strip binary (Unix)
+        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
+        run: strip target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.binary }} || true
+
+      - name: Package archive (Unix)
+        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
+        # install.sh expects archives named franken_whisper-vX.Y.Z-{os_arch}.tar.gz
+        # with the binary at the top level of the archive.
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p dist
+          ARCHIVE="franken_whisper-${GITHUB_REF_NAME}-${{ matrix.os_arch }}.${{ matrix.archive_ext }}"
+          cd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release
+          tar -czf "../../../dist/$ARCHIVE" "${{ matrix.binary }}"
+          cd ../../../dist
+          shasum -a 256 "$ARCHIVE" > "$ARCHIVE.sha256"
+
+      - name: Package archive (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist | Out-Null
+          $archive = "franken_whisper-${env:GITHUB_REF_NAME}-${{ matrix.os_arch }}.${{ matrix.archive_ext }}"
+          Compress-Archive -Path "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.binary }}" -DestinationPath "dist/$archive"
+          Push-Location dist
+          $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 $archive).Hash.ToLower()
+          "$hash  $archive" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "$archive.sha256"
+          Pop-Location
+
+      - name: Upload artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
+        with:
+          name: ${{ matrix.target }}
+          path: dist/*
+
+  release:
+    needs: build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+      id-token: write
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+
+      - name: Download all artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
+        with:
+          path: dist
+          merge-multiple: true
+
+      - name: Generate aggregate SHA256SUMS
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          shopt -s nullglob
+          cd dist
+          rm -f SHA256SUMS
+          for f in franken_whisper-*.tar.gz franken_whisper-*.zip; do
+            shasum -a 256 "$f" >> SHA256SUMS
+          done
+          cat SHA256SUMS
+
+      - name: Install cosign
+        uses: sigstore/cosign-installer@v4.1.1
+
+      - name: Sign release archives (sigstore bundle)
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          shopt -s nullglob
+          cd dist
+          for f in franken_whisper-*.tar.gz franken_whisper-*.zip; do
+            cosign sign-blob --yes --bundle "${f}.sigstore.json" "$f"
+          done
+
+      - name: Copy install scripts to dist
+        run: |
+          cp install.sh dist/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No install.sh found"
+          cp install.ps1 dist/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No install.ps1 found"
+
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v3
+        with:
+          name: ${{ github.ref_name }}
+          draft: false
+          prerelease: false
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          files: |
+            dist/*
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  notify-homebrew-tap:
+    name: Notify Homebrew Tap
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: release
+    timeout-minutes: 5
+    continue-on-error: true
+    env:
+      HAS_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN != '' }}
+    steps:
+      - name: Check for token
+        id: check
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${{ env.HAS_TOKEN }}" != "true" ]]; then
+            echo "::warning::HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN not configured, skipping notification"
+            echo "skip=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
+      - name: Extract version from tag
+        if: steps.check.outputs.skip != 'true'
+        id: version
+        run: echo "version=${GITHUB_REF_NAME#v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+      - name: Trigger formula update
+        if: steps.check.outputs.skip != 'true'
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@28959ce8df70de7be546dd1250a005dd32156697 # v4.0.1
+        with:
+          token: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}
+          repository: Dicklesworthstone/homebrew-tap
+          event-type: formula-update
+          client-payload: |
+            {
+              "tool": "franken_whisper",
+              "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
+            }

@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+name: release-automation
+
+# Watches the main branch for a Cargo.toml version bump and auto-creates a
+# matching `vX.Y.Z` tag. The tag then triggers dist.yml. Modeled on the
+# destructive_command_guard release-automation pattern.
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+jobs:
+  tag-release:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+
+      - name: Read version from Cargo.toml
+        id: version
+        run: |
+          version=$(sed -n 's/^version = "\(.*\)"/\1/p' Cargo.toml | head -1)
+          if [ -z "$version" ]; then
+            echo "::error::Unable to parse version from Cargo.toml"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          echo "version=$version" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Read latest tag
+        id: latest
+        run: |
+          latest=$(git tag --list 'v*' --sort=-v:refname | head -1)
+          echo "latest=$latest" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Create tag
+        if: steps.latest.outputs.latest != format('v{0}', steps.version.outputs.version)
+        run: |
+          tag="v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
+          echo "Creating release tag $tag"
+          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+          git tag -a "$tag" -m "Release $tag"
+          git push origin "$tag"
+
+      - name: Skip (already tagged)
+        if: steps.latest.outputs.latest == format('v{0}', steps.version.outputs.version)
+        run: |
+          echo "Latest tag matches Cargo.toml version; nothing to do."
